title: Example Article One
abstract: Use this row as a placeholder while you build your own database. Replace the title, summary, tags, and link with your own source information.

title: Example Article Two
abstract: This sample shows how one article can include different categories across the filter columns. You can delete it once you add your own sources.

title: Example Article Three
abstract: Use semicolons inside a filter column when one source should appear under multiple tags in the same filter group.
